Does NOT allow withdrawing USDC that is owed to borrowers."},"setChainlinkFeed(address)":{"notice":"Update the Chainlink price feed address (e.g. after migration)."},"setZKVerifier(address)":{"notice":"Update the ZK verifier address (use address(0) to disable)."},"usdc()":{"notice":"The USDC token lent out by this pool."},"zkVerifier()":{"notice":"Optional ZK verifier \u2014 set to address(0) to skip on testnet."}},"notice":"Credit-score-gated ETH-collateralised USDC lending pool for CreditLayer. Liquidation         \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500         The liquidator repays the outstanding debt and receives the full ETH         collateral plus a 5 % bonus sourced from the collateral.  Any surplus         collateral above the bonus is returned to the b864a652b0023591fa66f06a067b25b51ba9b303","dweb:/ipfs/QmeCfPykghhMc81VJTrHTC7sF6CRvaA1FXVq2pJhwYp1dV"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0x304d732678032a9781ae85c8f204c8fba3d3a5e31c02616964e75cfdc5049098","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://299ced486011781dc98f638059678323c03079fefae1482abaa2135b22fa92d0","dweb:/ipfs/QmbZNbcPTBxNvwChavN2kkZZs7xHhYL7mv51KrxMhsMs3j"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Context.sol":{"keccak256":"0x493033a8d1b176a037b2cc6a04dad01a5c157722049bbecf632ca876224dd4b2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6a708e8a5bdb1011c2c381c9a5cfd8a9a956d7d0a9dc1bd8bcdaf52f76ef2f12","dweb:/ipfs/Qmax9WHBnVsZP46ZxEMNRQpLQnrdE4dK8LehML1Py8FowF"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/ReentrancyGuard.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa516cbf1c7d15d3517c2d668601ce016c54395bf5171918a14e2686977465f53","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://1e1d079e8edfb58efd23a311e315a4807b01b5d1cf153f8fa2d0608b9dec3e99","dweb:/ipfs/QmTBExeX2SDTkn5xbk5ssbYSx7VqRp9H4Ux1CY4uQM4b9N"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/StorageSlot.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcf74f855663ce2ae00ed8352666b7935f6cddea2932fdf2c3ecd30a9b1cd0e97","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9f660b1f351b757dfe01438e59888f31f33ded3afcf5cb5b0d9bf9aa6f320a8b","dweb:/ipfs/QmarDJ5hZEgBtCmmrVzEZWjub9769eD686jmzb2XpSU1cM"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8891738ffe910f0cf2da09566928589bf5d63f4524dd734fd9cedbac3274dd5c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://971f954442df5c2ef5b5ebf1eb245d7105d9fbacc7386ee5c796df1d45b21617","dweb:/ipfs/QmadRjHbkicwqwwh61raUEapaVEtaLMcYbQZWs9gUkgj3u"]},"src/CreditLendingPool.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8436552c0c8ca64b02994c8ab607b0653af711a066dd0ab893dde44c85052e19","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://d69b003569e60110867cc45221f478373bfcbcc29b198c712d2c70f60a5392c7","dweb:/ipfs/QmTJ5DMWCyh9n7q3qMr9LcX7q69Z8NjcneBmiUSxmHzHLy"]},"src/interfaces/ICreditLendingPool.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe2b591460518c77c9eef38054c38e03adb11dcb76bfd8cc1365c446dd4d8fa68","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://37830ace255d16c52c4b59cb85e9999ba4437c54f9a6e9fe7cbf3a993046f49a","dweb:/ipfs/QmNyskjwgtWfhoX2CP3rLDGoUhbjpP1ybr8kfTuAsxq3Y7"]},"src/interfaces/ICreditScoreNFT.sol":{"keccak256":"0x422b1e0845b7b4a44c7a6f76753bdb32c93e8dc5ab8584a3384e9bdf5c0388f3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://4c71fc2312800b4c4fe872033d0f48e3b35c94917196908cd5ad178ce242e96f","dweb:/ipfs/QmPp66ptaAaYLJEJj7ZFPcfmwKusPMLRz8ETxE13aLpXXZ"]}},"version":1}

borrow(uint256,bytes,uint256).details: Caller sends ETH as collateral via msg.value.

params.scoreThreshold: Minimum score the caller claims to have; used as                       an early revert hint before the on-chain lookup
params.zkProof: Encoded ZK proof bytes (may be empty if zkVerifier == address(0))

params._chainlinkEthUsd: Address of the Chainlink ETH/USD feed.
params._usdc: Address of the USDC ERC-20 token.
params._zkVerifier: Address of the ZK verifier (address(0) to disable).

getHealthFactor(uint256).details: healthFactor = collateralValueUSD * 1e18 / (principal + accruedInterest)       Returns type(uint256).max when total debt is zero (infinite health).

params.loanId: The loan identifier to look up

returns._0: The LoanPosition struct for that loan

liquidate(uint256).details: Reverts with HealthFactorTooLow if the loan is still healthy.         The liquidator must supply USDC to cover the outstanding debt.         A 5 % bonus on the collateral is awarded to the liquidator.

params.loanId: The identifier of the loan to liquidate

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

repay(uint256).details: Caller must have approved the pool to spend at least         principal + accrued interest worth of USDC.         On success the locked ETH collateral is returned to the borrower.

params.loanId: The identifier of the loan to repay

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

LIQUIDATION_BONUS_BPS().notice: Liquidation bonus paid to the liquidator (5 %).

LOAN_DURATION().notice: Loan duration used for the informational `dueAt` field (30 days).

SECONDS_PER_YEAR().notice: Seconds in a calendar year — used for simple-interest accrual.

borrow(uint256,bytes,uint256).notice: Open a new collateralised USDC loan

borrowerLoans(address,uint256).notice: List of loan IDs opened by each borrower.

creditScoreNFT().notice: The CreditScoreNFT contract used to gate access.

getAccruedInterest(uint256).notice: Calculate the simple interest accrued on a loan from open to now.

getBorrowerLoans(address).notice: Returns the list of loan IDs opened by a borrower.

getHealthFactor(uint256).notice: Compute the current health factor for an open loan

getLoan(uint256).notice: Fetch the full loan record for a given loan ID

liquidate(uint256).notice: Seize the collateral of an under-collateralised loan

loans(uint256).notice: All loan positions indexed by loan ID.

repay(uint256).notice: Repay an active loan in full (principal + accrued interest)

rescueERC20(address,address,uint256).notice: Allow the owner to rescue tokens accidentally sent to the pool.         Does NOT allow withdrawing USDC that is owed to borrowers.

setChainlinkFeed(address).notice: Update the Chainlink price feed address (e.g. after migration).

setZKVerifier(address).notice: Update the ZK verifier address (use address(0) to disable).

usdc().notice: The USDC token lent out by this pool.

zkVerifier().notice: Optional ZK verifier — set to address(0) to skip on testnet.
